---
id: invite-user-1
title: "Generate invitation link for organization"
description: "Generates invitation link for organization, so users can join organization. The invitation can also be sent to an e-mail address."
sidebar_label: "Generate invitation link for organization"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Generate invitation link for organization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/organizations/{id}/invite"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Generates invitation link for organization, so users can join organization. The invitation can also be sent to an e-mail address.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
